programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Gullivers Travels
programme.desc: Surgeon Lemuel Gulliver a softhearted colonial is washed ashore an island called Sumatra The Land of Lilliput after a shipwreck

programme.title: 20000 Leagues Under the Sea
programme.desc: In the 19th century an expert marine biologist is hired by the government to determine whats sinking ships all over the ocean His daughter follows him They are intercepted by a mysterious captain Nemo and his incredible submarine

programme.title: The Boy Who Could Fly
programme.desc: Kindly adolescent Milly Lucy Deakins moves in next door to autistic teen Eric Gibb Jay Underwood The mute Eric whose parents were killed when he was 5 years old lives with his hard-drinking uncle Hugo Fred Gwynne and is obsessed with birds His tendency to stand on rooftops and window ledges posed as if hes flying alarms his social workers but when Eric saves Milly from a potentially deadly fall she begins to believe that the boy really can take flight

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: A slobbering St Bernard becomes the center of attention for a loving family but must contend with a dog-napping veterinarian and his henchmen

programme.title: Armistice - The End Game of WW1
programme.desc: Armistice - The End Game of WW1

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: Costly defeats made possible by commanders who disastrously underestimated their enemies

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack must track down an evil statue that causes men to kill the women they love

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: To avoid prosecution and to increase the value of his work an artist fakes his own death following the accidental death of one of his models Before long he goes stir crazy cooped in the loft apartment and accuses his wife of having an affair Later two ladies reluctantly agree to let a guy move into their apartment but theyre apprehensive about his intentions - for good reason

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A life on the edge hot rodder named Billy comes to town run by Sheriff Garrett he immediately dates and romances his daughter with ulterior motives linked to Garretts past for which he was once a champion of the hot rodding Will Garrett accept Billys challenge to the death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A mousy librarian over-react reports of a serial killer

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink helps an old friend by assisting Hogan in the theft of the plans for an assassination on the Fuehrer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Three American women show up at Stalag 13 and Hogan wants to know why

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Crew take in a young orphan girl and go out of their way to make a happy home for her on their island But their extraordinary behavior arouses Binghamtons suspicions and he uses the situation to have the 73 Crew sized up as possible Section 8s by some visiting Psychiatrists

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: During a mission to investigate the crash site of a Japanese transport plane McHale and The Crew recover 4 million dollars in American cash Thinking that its counterfeit they return to base where Gruber later trades it to Chief Urulu for some native trinkets But when they find out that the money is real - Stolen by the Japs from a bank in The Philippines - Gruber challenges Urulu to a winner-take-all poker game to get it back

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Opie Taylor runs away from Mayberry to join the Marines

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A meteor crashes onto the island The Professor soon concludes that the meteors cosmic rays are accelerating the aging process on the island and that the castaways will die of old age in one week

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After a bat bites Gilligan in the neck in a cave he is convinced that he will become a vampire and moves away to save his fellow castaways

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: In order to secure a loan from the bank Grampa must sign title to the McCoy farm over to his grandson Luke

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys dig up a brontosaurus leg bone on their property Kate wants to donate the bone to a museum but Grampa would rather cash in on a roadside stand tourist attraction

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 3 Fractured Fairy Tales Cinderella 2 Peabodys Improbably History Robin Hood Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 4

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 5 Fractured Fairy Tales Snow White Inc Peabodys Improbably History Robinson Crusoe Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 6

programme.title: Hong Kong Phoey
programme.desc: Hong Kong Phoey

programme.title: Hong 116
programme.desc: Hong 116

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to stop MAD from releasing millions in counterfeit money

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby believes that MAD is behind the theft of several military planes

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane resurrects his wife Tatania only to learn the woman hes kept frozen all these years is Kitty Lane an exotic dancer and impostor placed in Arcanes lab by General Sunderland Sunderland has been holding the real Tatania captive

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane uploads the memory of his former teacher directly into his own In an ironic twist of justice Carl Mirador was schizophrenic and is now driving Arcane insane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: When the Comfurt family suddenly strike it rich their car - containing their windfall in a safe locked inside the trunk - is stolen The Dukes track down the car as it changes into the hands of a ruthless bank robber

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An escaped Jiridian takes Lili hostage Their shuttle is sucked on to a Kimera ship where they with Liam have to go through an obstacle course to get to the core to exit

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: On an April 4 1968 Martin Luther King was assassinated in Memphis Tennesee With riots erupting all over the United States the Los Angeles Police Department braces for worse case scenarios such as rioting and bomb threats Friday and Gannon are assigned to the command post and monitor the situation from there and wait for the first sign of trouble However as the weekend progresses Friday notes that Los Angeles is quieter than normal and that many of the people are doing their best to remember that Dr King stood for peace

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E13
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E13

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A neighbors young second wife is more romantically interested in her stepson than her husband Her jealousy of Audra the stepsons childhood sweetheart leads to a shooting-and puts Audra in danger from the husband

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Arrested and accused of robbery in Lone Butte Cheyenne escapes to clear his name The only clues he has are the location of the gangs well-guarded hideout and that the killer was wearing an unusual gold lions head belt buckle

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A religious man is killing clergy Lt Stone and Inspector Keller race to find a connection between the clergymen to each other and to the killer When they figure out who the next victim is Mike Stone puts on the collar

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: The Chinese Connection
programme.desc: A young martial arts student returns home for the funeral of his martial arts teacher who died under mysterious circumstances A rival Japanese academy are suspected but there is no proof

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby believes that MAD is behind the theft of several military planes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Stench an agent of MAD has invented a substance that makes gold smell terrible making it valueless Inspector Gadget guards the national gold reserve at Fort Bucks

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation
